name: OBB
summary: The OBB class represents an oriented 3d bounding box.

constructors.name: OBB()
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the OBB class.

constructors.name: OBB(OBB)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the OBB class.

throws.when: Thrown when initialization fails.

constructors.name: OBB(Point, .Vector[], .Double[])
constructors.signature: public OBB(Point center, Vector[] axis, double[] extent)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the OBB class.

params.name: axis
params.doc: Three element array of unit-length vectors parallel the axis of the OBB.

params.name: extent
params.doc: Three element array of the OBB extents (half-lengths of the edges).

throws.when: Thrown when initialization fails.

constructors.name: OBB(Point, Vector, Vector, Vector, Double, Double, Double)
constructors.signature: public OBB(Point center, Vector axis0, Vector axis1, Vector axis2, double extent0, double extent1, double extent2)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the OBB class.

params.name: axis0
params.doc: Unit-length vector parallel to one axis of the OBB.

params.name: axis1
params.doc: Unit-length vector parallel to the second axis of the OBB.

params.name: axis2
params.doc: Unit-length vector parallel to the third axis of the OBB.

params.name: extent0
params.doc: The extent (half-length) of the side parallel to axis one.

params.name: extent1
params.doc: The extent (half-length) of the side parallel to axis two.

params.name: extent2
params.doc: The extent (half-length) of the side parallel to axis three.

throws.when: Thrown when initialization fails.

methods.name: ClosestPointTo(Line)
methods.summary: Calculates the closest point in OBB to given Line.

returns.doc: Closest point in OBB to given Line.

throws.when: Thrown when null is assigned to the line parameter.

methods.name: ClosestPointTo(LineSegment)
methods.summary: Calculates the closest point in OBB to given LineSegment.

returns.doc: Closest point in OBB to given LineSegment.

throws.when: Thrown when null is assigned to the lineSegment parameter.

methods.name: ClosestPointTo(Point)
methods.summary: Calculates the closest point in OBB to given point.

returns.doc: Closest point in OBB to given point.

throws.when: Thrown when null is assigned to the point parameter.

methods.name: ComputeVertices
methods.summary: Calculates the corner points of the OBB.

returns.doc: Array of corner points.

methods.name: DistanceTo(Line)
methods.summary: Calculates the distance from OBB to given Line.

returns.doc: Distance from OBB to given Line.

throws.when: Thrown when null is assigned to the line parameter.

methods.name: DistanceTo(LineSegment)
methods.summary: Calculates the distance from OBB to given LineSegment.

returns.doc: Distance from OBB to given LineSegment.

throws.when: Thrown when null is assigned to the lineSegment parameter.

methods.name: DistanceTo(Point)
methods.summary: Calculates the distance from OBB to given point.

returns.doc: Distance from OBB to given point.

throws.when: Thrown when null is assigned to the point parameter.

methods.name: Equals(Object)
methods.summary: Tests for the exact equality of two OBBs.

returns.doc: True if the OBBs are equal, otherwise false.

methods.name: Equals(OBB)
methods.summary: Tests for the exact equality of two OBBs.

returns.doc: True if the OBBs are equal, otherwise false.

methods.name: GetHashCode
methods.summary: Gets the hash code for the obb.

returns.doc: Hash code for the obb.

methods.name: IntersectionPointsWith(Line)
methods.summary: Calculates the intersection points between OBB and given Line.

returns.doc: Array of intersection points.

throws.when: Thrown when null is assigned to the line parameter.

methods.name: IntersectionPointsWith(LineSegment)
methods.summary: Calculates the intersection points between OBB and given LineSegment.

returns.doc: Array of intersection points.

throws.when: Thrown when null is assigned to the lineSegment parameter.

methods.name: IntersectionWith(Line)
methods.summary: Creates an intersection between the OBB and the given Line.

returns.doc: Intersection as LineSegment or null if no intersection was found.

throws.when: Thrown when null is assigned to the line parameter.

methods.name: IntersectionWith(LineSegment)
methods.summary: Creates an intersection between the OBB and the given LineSegment.

returns.doc: Intersection as LineSegment or null if no intersection was found.

throws.when: Thrown when null is assigned to the lineSegment parameter.

methods.name: Intersects(GeometricPlane)
methods.summary: Tests if current OBB intersects with the given GeometricPlane

returns.doc: True if the OBB intersects with the given GeometricPlane, otherwise false

throws.when: Thrown when null is assigned to the geometricPlane parameter.

methods.name: Intersects(Line)
methods.summary: Tests if current OBB intersects with the given Line

returns.doc: True if the OBB intersects with the given Line, otherwise false

throws.when: Thrown when null is assigned to the line parameter.

methods.name: Intersects(LineSegment)
methods.summary: Tests if current OBB intersects with the given LineSegment

returns.doc: True if the OBB intersects with the given LineSegment, otherwise false

throws.when: Thrown when null is assigned to the lineSegment parameter.

methods.name: Intersects(OBB)
methods.summary: Tests if current OBB intersects with the given OBB

returns.doc: True if the OBBs intersect, otherwise false

throws.when: Thrown when null is assigned to the obb parameter.

methods.name: SetAxis(.Vector[])
methods.summary: Sets the Axis to the OBB.

params.name: axis
params.doc: Three element array of unit-length vectors parallel the axis of the OBB.

throws.when: Thrown when setting the axis fails.

methods.name: SetAxis(Vector, Vector, Vector)
methods.signature: public void SetAxis(Vector axis0, Vector axis1, Vector axis2)
methods.summary: Sets the Axis to the OBB.

params.name: axis0
params.doc: Unit-length vector parallel to one axis of the OBB.

params.name: axis1
params.doc: Unit-length vector parallel to the second axis of the OBB.

params.name: axis2
params.doc: Unit-length vector parallel to the third axis of the OBB.

throws.when: Thrown when setting the axis fails.

methods.name: SetExtent(.Double[])
methods.summary: Sets the extents to the OBB.

params.name: extent
params.doc: Three element array of the OBB extents (half-lengths of the edges).

throws.when: Thrown when setting the extent fails.

methods.name: SetExtent(Double, Double, Double)
methods.signature: public void SetExtent(double extent0, double extent1, double extent2)
methods.summary: Sets the extents to the OBB.

params.name: extent0
params.doc: The extent (half-length) of the side parallel to axis one.

params.name: extent1
params.doc: The extent (half-length) of the side parallel to axis two.

params.name: extent2
params.doc: The extent (half-length) of the side parallel to axis three.

throws.when: Thrown when setting the extent fails.

methods.name: ShortestSegmentTo(Line)
methods.summary: Calculates the shortest LineSegment from OBB to the given Line.

returns.doc: Shortest LineSegment from OBB to the given Line.

throws.when: Thrown when null is assigned to the line parameter.

methods.name: ShortestSegmentTo(LineSegment)
methods.summary: Calculates the shortest LineSegment from OBB to the given LineSegment.

returns.doc: Shortest LineSegment from OBB to the given LineSegment.

throws.when: Thrown when null is assigned to the lineSegment parameter.

methods.name: ShortestSegmentTo(Point)
methods.summary: Calculates the shortest LineSegment from OBB to the given point.

returns.doc: Shortest LineSegment from OBB to the given point.

throws.when: Thrown when null is assigned to the point parameter.

properties.name: Axis0
properties.summary: Gets an axis parallel to one side of the OBB, a unit-length vector orthogonal to Axis1 and Axis2.

properties.name: Axis1
properties.summary: Gets an axis parallel to the second side of the OBB, a unit-length vector orthogonal to Axis0 and Axis2.

properties.name: Axis2
properties.summary: Gets an axis parallel to the third side of the OBB, a unit-length vector orthogonal to Axis0 and Axis1.

properties.name: Center
properties.summary: Gets or sets the center point of the box.

properties.name: Extent0
properties.summary: Gets or sets the extent parallel to Axis0.

properties.name: Extent1
properties.summary: Gets or sets the extent parallel to Axis1.

properties.name: Extent2
properties.summary: Gets or sets the extent parallel to Axis2.
